summary: Nowon is Seoul's largest-population gu and a DPK stronghold. 우원식 and 김성환 won 58.99 and 58.51. Large residential apartment blocks, middle-class families drawn by education (Junggye-dong 학원가) and transit access.

issues.label: Middle-class apartment base
issues.description: Large residential apartment blocks anchor stable middle-class DPK vote.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: 우원식 is a senior DPK figure; multi-cycle DPK support.
